Class HistoryquoteQualityGroup

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.reportviews.historyquotequality.HistoryquoteQualityIds
grafioschtrader.reportviews.historyquotequality.HistoryquoteQualityGroup
Direct Known Subclasses:
HistoryquoteQualityHead
public class HistoryquoteQualityGroup extends HistoryquoteQualityIds
Group by connector, stock exchange, asset class (equities, bond, ...), special investment like (ETF, Direct investment, ...)
